title: Get and Set Methods with Date Objects in JavaScript
summary: Working with dates is a common task in web development, and JavaScript provides a built-in Date object to handle date and time-related operations. Two essential methods for manipulating Date objects are get and set methods. In this blog, we will explore how to use these methods to retrieve and modify various components of a Date object.
content: Working with dates is a common task in web development, and JavaScript provides a built-in Date object to handle date and time-related operations.
